label: Digital Transformation Acceleration
description: The letter emphasizes the increased demand for digital and cloud solutions due to the ongoing health crisis and the need for companies to accelerate their digital transformation.
key_quote: The ongoing health crisis has created, for the technology industry, an upsurge in demand – especially for digital and cloud solutions.

label: Cloud-Based Solutions Growth
description: The letter highlights the growth and importance of cloud-based solutions, particularly Microsoft Azure and LivePerson's Conversational Cloud, in enabling business growth and customer engagement.
key_quote: Microsoft has been investing in creating new Azure Data Centers to fulfill the demand for Azure Core Cloud Computing, Azure Data Services, Dynamics 365 and Microsoft 365.

label: Strategic Partnerships Value
description: The letter underscores the value of strategic partnerships, specifically with Microsoft and LivePerson, in enhancing service delivery, expanding capabilities, and driving innovation.
key_quote: Microsoft Enhanced Support Services group, in partnership with Infosys, accelerated the journey to differentiate the Microsoft support experience.

label: Customer Experience Enhancement
description: A key theme is the focus on enhancing customer experience through data-driven insights, streamlined processes, and improved support services.
key_quote: The last mile, for them, is about enhancing support experience for their customers by ensuring solution quality and limiting business disruptions.

label: Infosys Market Leadership
description: The letter asserts Infosys's position as a market leader in the digital services and consulting industry, driven by client focus, innovative solutions, and investments in people.
key_quote: Infosys has delivered industry-leading growth and is in pole position for another year of market-leading performance.

label: Data-Driven Decision Making
description: The letter emphasizes the importance of leveraging data to improve customer support, personalize experiences, and drive enterprise growth.
key_quote: Data continues to pave the path to excellence for Microsoft.
